title: Campaign pressure summary

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Rank-1 condition-specific regulator with a 3014-gene Stim8hr footprint under on-target KD and near-inert K562 behavior (1 DE, cell-type-specific).

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RCC1L at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Despite 780 on-target Stim48hr DE, the Rest condition is flagged as putative off-target and it shows the set's highest K562 DE (20), a specificity concern.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps RWDD2B at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps CCDC22 at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Solid stim-specific footprint (457 DE at Stim48hr on-target KD, only 20 at Rest) but the Stim8hr arm showed no on-target KD, so it is worth advancing contingent on capacity.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Its footprint is confined to Stim8hr (407 DE) and collapses to 2 DE by Stim48hr, indicating a transient signal that warrants holding as a ranked backup rather than immediate advancement.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps CYB5RL at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Rank-9 with an on-target KD Stim48hr footprint (386 DE), but cross-cell-type is not_tested so its non-immune specificity gap is unresolved.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Its 350-DE signal is confined to the single Stim48hr on-target condition while Stim8hr/Rest show no on-target KD, and transfer is not_tested, making it the weaker untested candidate.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps SCO2 at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps CCDC136 at advance if capacity allows until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps MITD1 at advance if capacity allows until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps GZMB at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps FANCL at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Stim8hr is flagged putative off-target and cross-cell is not tested, weakening its lowest-ranked (score 706) stimulated on-target signal.

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown plus matched Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr targeted RNA-seq before assay-design promotion
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps BCKDHA at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: orthogonal knockdown and non-immune transfer check before spending primary assay capacity
pressure_accounting.reason: model disagreement is evidence for review priority, not acceptance; deterministic review keeps ZC3H12A at hold as ranked backup until the assay gate passes

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: It is a known CollecTRI TF with 59 targets, the largest on-target stim footprint (567 DE), and the cleanest cross-cell-type profile (0 K562 DE).

pressure_accounting.assay_gate: none
pressure_accounting.reason: Lowest score with on-target-KD-confirmed Rest DE (308) nearly matching Stim48hr (422), making it the least activation-specific, and its 15-target regulon is a weaker anchor than IRF4.

boundary_statement: Claude pressure became review work: aligned rows stayed aligned, more-aggressive rows became assay gates, gate probes added controls or lowered priority, gate coverage stayed explicit, and no accepted state changed.
